Description: Mnemosyne tier lines — 6 custom WCIDs (850352-850357). Two lines: regular (Tiny/Small/Large, 850352-850354) and Unlocked (Unlocked Tiny/Small/Large, 850355-850357). Clones from 9310; MirrorEmoteFromWcid 9310. Blue IconUnderlay 100676435 + black number overlays.

Weenies.Notes: Regular Mnemosyne (line 1) — Regular tier. Frost (128) glow. Overlay '1' black (100690976). Replaces vanilla Tiny Mnemosyne (9314, t1).

PropertiesString.Name: Tiny Mnemosyne
PropertiesString.LongDesc: Turn this item in to Collector Vaetha (810003) in the Town Network for experience and pyreal rewards.

Weenies.Notes: Regular Mnemosyne (line 1) — Quality tier. Acid (256) glow. Overlay '2' black (100690977). Replaces vanilla Small Mnemosyne (9312, t2).

PropertiesString.Name: Small Mnemosyne
PropertiesString.LongDesc: Turn this item in to Collector Vaetha (810003) in the Town Network for experience and pyreal rewards.

Weenies.Notes: Regular Mnemosyne (line 1) — Pristine tier. Magical (1) glow. Overlay '3' black (100690978). Replaces vanilla Large Mnemosyne (9310, t3).

PropertiesString.Name: Large Mnemosyne
PropertiesString.LongDesc: Turn this item in to Collector Vaetha (810003) in the Town Network for experience and pyreal rewards.

Weenies.Notes: Unlocked Mnemosyne (line 2) — Regular tier. Frost (128) glow. Overlay '1' black (100690976). Replaces vanilla Unlocked Tiny Mnemosyne (9315, t2).

PropertiesString.Name: Unlocked Tiny Mnemosyne
PropertiesString.LongDesc: Turn this item in to Collector Vaetha (810003) in the Town Network for experience and pyreal rewards.

Weenies.Notes: Unlocked Mnemosyne (line 2) — Quality tier. Acid (256) glow. Overlay '2' black (100690977). Replaces vanilla Unlocked Small Mnemosyne (9313, t3).

PropertiesString.Name: Unlocked Small Mnemosyne
PropertiesString.LongDesc: Turn this item in to Collector Vaetha (810003) in the Town Network for experience and pyreal rewards.

Weenies.Notes: Unlocked Mnemosyne (line 2) — Perfect tier. Lightning (64) glow. Overlay '4' black (100690979). Replaces vanilla Unlocked Large Mnemosyne (9311, t4).

PropertiesString.Name: Unlocked Large Mnemosyne
PropertiesString.LongDesc: Turn this item in to Collector Vaetha (810003) in the Town Network for experience and pyreal rewards.
